title: Total Battle: Krigsstrategi
notes:
Ert kungarike blir starkare, ers majestät. Kolla in vad V345 har att erbjuda dig:

Buggfixar
– Vi har implementerat en möjlig fix för den visuella buggen som påverkade visningen av tapperhetspoäng som tjänats in i säsongsturneringar.
– I händelsen Krigsverktyg fick vissa spelare inga poäng för att samla heliga drycker. Vi har vidtagit åtgärder för att lösa det här problemet.
– I sällsynta fall kunde vissa spelare inte använda påskyndningar på sina marscher. Vi har arbetat med att åtgärda detta.

notes:
Going Global!

notes:

4. Lowered enemy difficulty, removed T4 Aura animation, fixed Horde Invasion skill rates.
5. Super Drinks from Island Goldrush rounds 1–3; team leader role transfer.
6. Invite friends who haven't logged in; element/class filters; HOT label on Trials.

Slutför dagliga uppgifter för att hjälpa laget att göra mål och avancera genom kvalificeringsrundorna. Tjäna en ny profilram, Ivory Liberty-paketet och en ny dekoration.

title: BitLife - Life Simulator
notes: What's up, Bitizens! Are you ready for the ULTIMATE summer showdown? We've got some updates coming your way that are going to be FIRE. But first, while we're getting them all ready, we've got a round of bug fixes and maintenance. Get excited and head over to our social channels to learn more. While you're there, drop us a screenshot of your favorite BitLife moment from this past week!

title: Jawaker: Games & Friends
notes: Bug Fixing and System stability enhancement

title: Triple Match 3D
notes:
Our latest update is here, packed with new features and enhancements to elevate your travel experience. We've introduced even more stunning destinations to explore, along with special UI improvements that make your experience smoother than ever.
Get ready to pack your bags and embark on your next adventure with us!

title: Minecraft
notes:

title: Love Island: The Game
notes:
We've made some behind-the-scenes upgrades and improvements.

Until next time, stay sun-kissed and drama-free!

title: Fun Bridge
notes: Appen uppdateras regelbundet (buggkorrigeringar och förbättrad prestanda) för att erbjuda dig den bästa spelupplevelsen. Tack för att du använder Funbridge!

title: Tiles Survive!
notes:
[Optimeringar och felrättningar]
- Ett nytt "Ingen förhandsvisning"-alternativ har lagts till i inställningarna för aviseringar om nya meddelanden. När detta är aktiverat kommer inga aviseringar att visas för meddelanden från den valda kanalen. De kommer inte heller att förhandsvisas i huvudgränssnittet.

- Tema 7 har lagts till för vildmarkskartan: Studiokaos. När du har uppdaterat till den senaste versionen kan du utforska detta helt nya område och samla exklusiva dekorativa byggnader och andr

title: Vikings: War of Clans PvP
notes:
Added:
- The "Sunlit Mountains" Fair. It will run from June 1 to 9. Take part in the event to win a new March Skin — the Mountain Guardian. We've also added two new rules for Contests to this Fair.
- New levels for the Gard of the Empire and the Gard of the Sea Serpent.

Changed:
- Troop Sets and the troop formation window. You can now save March Skins in Troop Sets and change March Skins in the window for forming a march troop as well as in the Palace.

title: Warhammer 40,000: Tacticus ™
notes:
Special "Armageddon" events start June 22, celebrating the release of Warhammer 40,000’s 11th Edition.
Collaborate with other players worldwide in the new Global Home Screen Events!
New "Insanguination" event featuring Cezare begins July 7.
Battle Pass featuring Tarvakh begins June 28.
Last "Perfection Personified" legendary event featuring Lucius on July 26.
See the in‑game notes for full details.

title: Ludo STAR
notes: - Performance Improvements & Bug fixes

title: Pokémon TCG Pocket
notes:
● New Pulsing Aura booster packs are now available.
● Gold frames have been added to flair.
● A Claim All feature has been added for packs.
● Updates to the Obtain Items feature.
● A 2D pattern code feature has been added for friend requests.
● Revisions have been made to some features.

title: Age of Origins:Tower Defense
developer: Hong Kong Ke Mo software Co., Limited
notes: Optimized some of the game play.

title: Slotomania™ Slots Vegas Casino
notes: Hi Slotomania Fans! Great news! We’ve packed the game with tons of exciting upgrades that will make your Slotomania experience smoother, richer, and more thrilling than ever. New slots are always on the way, and your favorite classics are right here waiting for you. Enjoy bigger wins, faster and smoother gameplay, exciting new features, and incredible quests. It’s the Slotomania you love-only better! Have fun and good luck!

title: Match Villains
notes:
Celebrate loud. Play louder. 100 new levels await!

NEW ITEM: PLASMA GLOBE! One touch, sparks everywhere.

NEW COLLECTION: JULY FOURTH! Stars, stripes, and cards for celebrating.

NEW PASS: JULY FOURTH! Light up your look with a NEW STYLE.

NEW PAINT TRAIL: JULY FOURTH! Follow the sparks to BANNERS.

NEW SHRINK INC.: STATUE OF LIBERTY! Shrink the statue, claim the CHARM.

NEW CHARMS: JULY FOURTH! Spark up your banner.

NEW POSTER: TIKI TACTICS! Island vibes, clever plans.

Stay sharp, Villains!

title: Merge Hotel Empire－Design Game
notes: Fixes of critical errors, minor bugfixes, improved overall stability

title: Bingo Voyage: Live Bingo Games
notes:
Thank you for being part of our amazing community! We are dedicated to bringing you the #1 gaming experience, and this update is no exception.

Update now to enjoy: 
• Fresh in-game events and rewards
• A smoother, bug-free experience
• Exciting new improvements and surprises

Ready to play? Let’s go! Don't forget to leave us a review—we love hearing from you!
